4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

5022.issue: [S5022] Please consider migrating to admin 5 UI (jsonConfig) or react based UI.

5049.issue: [E5049] process.env is used in source files (lib/ping.js). process.env is incompatible with compact mode. Please use adapter configuration instead.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (lib/utils.js). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.samsung/blob/master/io-package.json).

0047.issue: [S0047] At least one dependency at [package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.samsung/blob/master/package.json) requires a specific version. Consider using "~1.2.3" or "^1.2.3" syntax unless freezing dependencies is really desired.

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.samsung/blob/master/package.json).

0043.issue: [W0043] dependency should not require a github version. Please change "samsungtv:https://git@github.com/luca-saggese/samsungtv"

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^24.12.3" at [package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.samsung/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
